name: Roasting Corn
recipeIngredient: 8 ears Corn; fresh -- husks left on
recipeInstructions:
1. Prepare a medium hot fire (the same as cooking steaks).
2. Dampen the husks with water and, if desired, wrap in foil.
3. Grill for 15-20 minutes, turning occasionally until both sides are roasted.
4. When ready to serve, remove the husks.
5. Coat each ear of corn with butter, lime juice, salt, and chile powder to taste.
Serves 8.
